member.name: T:DotNetExtras.Configuration.AppSettings
member.summary: Implements methods for setting and retrieving application configuration settings.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Configuration.AppSettings.GetValue``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a primitive application setting value for the given key.
member.param: Name of the configuration setting key.
member.returns: Configuration setting holding a single value.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Configuration.AppSettings.GetArrayValue``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a configuration setting array value for the given key.
member.typeparam: Data type of the list elements.
member.param: Name of the configuration setting key.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Configuration.AppSettings.GetListValue``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a configuration setting list value for the given key.
member.typeparam: Data type of the list elements.
member.param: Name of the configuration setting key.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Configuration.AppSettings.GetHashSetValue``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a configuration setting hash set value for the given key.
member.typeparam: Data type of the hash set elements.
member.param: Name of the configuration setting key.
member.returns: Configuration setting holding a hash set.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Configuration.AppSettings.GetDictionaryValue``2(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a configuration setting dictionary value for the given key.
member.typeparam: Data type of the dictionary keys (currently, only string keys are supported).
Data type of the dictionary values.
member.param: Name of the configuration setting key.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Configuration.AppSettings.ResolveReference(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Resolves a reference which can be either a simple key path or a template with placeholders. If the reference contains {...} placeholders, they are resolved. Otherwise, the reference is treated as a simple key path.
member.param: Reference string that can be a key path or a template.
member.returns: Resolved string value, or null if the reference points to a missing/null value with no literals.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Configuration.AppSettings.ContainsPlaceholder(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a string contains valid (properly closed) {...} placeholders.
member.returns: True if the text contains at least one valid placeholder; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Configuration.AppSettings.ResolvePlaceholders(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Resolves placeholders in the format {key} with their corresponding configuration values. Use {{ to escape { and }} to escape } in literal text.
member.returns: String with placeholders replaced by their configuration values, or null if all placeholders are missing/null and there are no literal characters.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Configuration.AppSettings.GetRefKey(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the redirection key from the $ref configuration setting at the same level as the specified key.
member.param: Name of the configuration setting key.
member.returns: Redirection key if found; otherwise, null.

member.name: T:DotNetExtras.Configuration.AppSettings.Global
member.summary: Groups methods that allow the application to set the configuration settings once during startup and then get them from anywhere in the code.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Configuration.AppSettings.Global.Get
member.summary: Returns application configuration settings initialized by the method during application startup.
member.returns: The application configuration settings initialized by the method.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Configuration.AppSettings.Global.Set(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes the configuration object, so that it can be accessed from anywhere in the code.

member.name: T:DotNetExtras.Configuration.AppSettings.Load
member.summary: Groups methods that load the application settings form different sources.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Configuration.AppSettings.Load.FromDictionary(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.String}})
member.summary: Loads the application configuration settings from a dictionary.
member.param: A dictionary containing the application settings.
member.remarks:
You can pass array items by appending zero-based index to the key as illustrated in the example (e.g."ServiceA:ArraySetting1:0", "ServiceA:ArraySetting1:1", etc.). See
for details.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Configuration.AppSettings.Load.FromJsonString(System.String)
member.summary: Loads the application configuration settings from a JSON string.
member.param: A JSON string containing the application settings.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Configuration.AppSettings.Load.FromJsonFile(System.String)
member.summary: Loads the application configuration settings from a JSON file.
member.param: Path to the JSON file containing the application settings.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Configuration.AppSettings.Reload(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration@)
member.summary: Forces configuration settings to be reloaded from the provider.
member.remarks: This method is useful when configuration settings are stored in a location that can change at runtime, such as Azure Key Vault, password safe, and so on. Fore details, see .

member.name: N:DotNetExtras.Configuration
member.summary: Simplifies access and usage of the application configuration settings.
